'''shayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:plangently|plangently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plangently|plangently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shayate|shayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shayatesher|shayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatesherĂ«m|shayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shayatero|shayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayateshĂ«|shayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayateshĂ«m|shayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishayatero|gokishayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayateshĂ«|gokishayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayateshĂ«m|gokishayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshayankerom|goshayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayankeshĂ«|goshayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayankeshĂ«m|goshayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshayankeya|goshayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shayaterom|shayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayatemu|shayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shayateya|shayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishayaterom|gokishayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayatemu|gokishayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishayateya|gokishayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shayayate|shayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shayayatesher|shayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayatesherĂ«m|shayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shayayatero|shayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayayateshĂ«|shayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayateshĂ«m|shayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishayayatero|gokishayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayayateshĂ«|gokishayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayateshĂ«m|gokishayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshayayankerom|goshayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayayankeshĂ«|goshayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayayankeshĂ«m|goshayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshayayankeya|goshayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shayayaterom|shayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayayatemu|shayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shayayateya|shayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishayayaterom|gokishayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayayatemu|gokishayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishayayateya|gokishayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠte|shĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠtesher|shĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠtero|shĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠtero|gokishĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠyĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠyĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠterom|shĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠtemu|shĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠyĂŠteya|shĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠterom|gokishĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠyĂŠteya|gokishĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafyafte|shafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafyaftesher|shafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafyaftesherĂ«m|shafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafyaftero|shafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafyafteshĂ«|shafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafyafteshĂ«m|shafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafyaftero|gokishafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafyafteshĂ«|gokishafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafyafteshĂ«m|gokishafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafyafnkerom|goshafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafyafnkeshĂ«|goshafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafyafnkeshĂ«m|goshafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafyafnkeya|goshafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafyafterom|shafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafyaftemu|shafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafyafteya|shafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafyafterom|gokishafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafyaftemu|gokishafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafyafteya|gokishafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
